I think that a balance between hard work and natural ability is necessary for achieving genius-level intelligence and success.

header_21.raw_response: Considering my personality and experiences, I tend to value stability and predictability. I often prefer to work ahead of schedule and have a relaxed approach to deadlines. I've found that this helps me stay focused and avoid last-minute stress. While I'm capable of working under pressure, I don't enjoy it, and I think it's healthier for me to take my time and work at a steady pace. Given this, I would place the deadline at around 20 on the spectrum, where there's still some time to spare, but not so much that it becomes complacent.
